200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

When attacking, the fighter chooses a new random target and poisons it, dealing 30000 damage over 2,4 sec.

description 4/6

When attacking, the fighter chooses a new random target and poisons it, dealing 55000 damage over 2,4 sec. If there are other enemies near the target, one of them will also be poisoned.

description 6/6

When attacking, the fighter chooses a new random target and poisons it, dealing 85000 damage over 2,4 sec. If there are other enemies near the target, one of them will also be poisoned. If a fighter attacks a poisoned enemy, it triggers a poison explosion, dealing 170000 damage to all enemies over 4,5 sec. Another poison explosion can’t be triggered during this time.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Doom’s attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 50% of the target’s damage.

description 4/6

Doom’s attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 50% of the target’s damage. Doom’s attack poisons not only the target, but also all enemies in a small radius around the target.

description 6/6

Doom’s attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 50% of the target’s damage. Doom’s attack poisons not only the target, but also all enemies in a small radius around the target. Poison explosion deals an additional 100000 magic damage. All damage of the poison explosion ignores 25% armor.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Doom’s attacks steal 20% of the target’s crit and dodge for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects.

description 4/6

Doom’s attacks steal 20% of the target’s crit and dodge for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects. Doom’s physical armor is increased by 30% for each poisoned enemy. Up to 5 effects. This ability works for the duration of the battle.

description 6/6

Doom’s attacks steal 20% of the target’s crit and dodge for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects. Doom’s physical armor is increased by 30% for each poisoned enemy. Up to 5 effects. This ability works for the duration of the battle. When a poison explosion occurs, the healing rate of Doom and all allies is increased by 60% for 8 sec. Also, Doom and all allies restore 200000 for 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Whenever Doom changes the target of the attack, Doom’s damage is increased by 25% for 10 sec. Whenever Doom 4 effects, all the ability effects are removed.

description 4/6

Whenever Doom changes the target of the attack, Doom’s damage is increased by 25% for 10 sec. Whenever Doom 4 effects, all the ability effects are removed. Doom’s damage is increased by 10% for each poisoned enemy for 1 sec. Up to 5 effects.

description 6/6

Whenever Doom changes the target of the attack, Doom’s damage is increased by 25% for 10 sec. Whenever Doom 4 effects, all the ability effects are removed. Doom’s damage is increased by 10% for each poisoned enemy for 1 sec. Up to 5 effects. All poisoned enemies have their physical armor reduced by 20% for the duration of the battle as long as they are poisoned. When Doom attacks a poisoned enemy, they deal 33% more damage to the target.

Materials

Snake Potion
Breath of Death

purchase in:
